title: shenqimod
description: This mod adds new weapons, new worlds, new equipment, new ores, new creatures
body:
Supported game version: 1.20.1 Module loader: forge(No test neoforge) Original author of the mod: yang_th1202 (myself)

Mods add many dimensions: There are diamond, coal, iron, lapis lazuli, gold, emerald, redstone , death , quartz, stone, ender, super, x-ray, hydration, moss random ore, blue cloud crystal dimensions. They need to be opened with different god keys

Five ores have been added to the module: There are ender mines, moss random mines, lazy god mines, super mines, X-ray mines. The mod adds equipment and multi-tools made from these 5 ores (except Ender Shadow, Moss Random Mine). Ender ore spawns in the end land, moss random ore can be synthesized or generated in the stone dimension, lazy god ore is generated in the blue cloud crystal dimension, X-ray is generated in the main world and stone dimension, and super ore is generated in the main world and stone dimension.

The mod adds 5 kinds of creatures, they are pigs contaminated by the death dimension, and hydrated pigs, hydrated zombies, hydrated skeletons, hydrated coolies afraid (do not explode) hydrated monsters will spawn in the Blue Cloud Crystal dimension and hydration dimension, and pigs contaminated by the death dimension will spawn in the death dimension and the Overworld.

The mod has added some powerful weapons in the "神器" column, so I won't introduce it here, so let's experience it in the game yourself

Note: The author is an English slag of Chinese nationality, so the above introduction is translated with a translator (including this article)
